  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Turn-of-nut match marks absent or not rotated, indicating improper pretensioning of structural bolts."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-tension bolts per RCSC turn-of-nut method and apply match marks.",
    "Inspect all bolted connections in the affected area for similar defects."
  ],
  "rationale": "Per RCSC Specification, turn-of-nut match marks are required to verify proper pretension. Their absence or lack of rotation indicates bolts may not be adequately tensioned, compromising structural integrity. This is a non-compliant condition at rough-complete stage.",
  "references": ["RCSC Specification (Section on Turn-of-Nut Method)"]
}
